name: PAY_INPUT_VALUES_F
description: This table contains the input values for an element. Each input value has a unit of measure and can have validations and conditions defined to control the data entry when the element is assigned to a person. For example, an earning element may have an input value for hours worked.

columns.Name: INPUT_VALUE_ID
columns.Comments: System-generated primary key column.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Display sequence number for the input value.

columns.Name: ELEMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Element Type Identifier

columns.Name: GENERATE_DB_ITEMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether database items are generated for the input values.

columns.Name: HOT_DEFAULT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the default value is a HOT default. .

columns.Name: MANDATORY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the input value is required for an entry.  (Validated by a lookup).

columns.Name: USER_ENTERABLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: USER_ENTERABLE_FLAG

columns.Name: BASE_NAME
columns.Comments: BASE_NAME

columns.Name: UOM
columns.Comments: Unit of measure for the input value (hours, monetary amount, etc).

columns.Name: USER_DISPLAY_FLAG
columns.Comments: USER_DISPLAY_FLAG

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: RESERVED_INPUT_VALUE
columns.Comments: RESERVED_INPUT_VALUE

columns.Name: RETRO_STATIC_FLAG
columns.Comments: RETRO_STATIC_FLAG

columns.Name: FORCE_RRV_MODE
columns.Comments: FORCE_RRV_MODE

columns.Name: DEFAULT_VALUE
columns.Comments: Default for the input value on entry.  Value may be overridden for an element link, and for specific entries.

columns.Name: FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Formula to generate the input value

columns.Name: RATE_FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Formula used by the Rate Engine to calculate the Rate contribution amount.

columns.Name: VALIDATION_OVERRIDE_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: VALIDATION_OVERRIDE_MESSAGE

columns.Name: LOOKUP_TYPE
columns.Comments: List of allowable input values

columns.Name: MIN_VALUE
columns.Comments: Minimum value allowed on entry.  May be overridden at the element link.

columns.Name: MAX_VALUE
columns.Comments: Maximum value allowed on entry.  May be overridden at the element link.

columns.Name: VO_NAME
columns.Comments: View object name used to validate the input value

columns.Name: VALUE_SET_CODE
columns.Comments: VALUE_SET_CODE

columns.Name: WARNING_OR_ERROR
columns.Comments: Indicates the kind of message that is generated if the input value is not valid for min/max or formula validation.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the context. Foreign key to FF_CONTEXTS.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
